name: User can log in after correcting invalid credentials
description:
As a user of the SauceDemo application
  I want to be able to log in with valid credentials
  So that I can access the product inventory
descriptionHtml:
As a user of the SauceDemo application
I want to be able to log in with valid credentials

steps.name: Given  a "locked" user is on the "login" page
Then  an error message should be displayed
Given  a "standard" user is on the "login" page
Then  the user should be on the "inventory" page

labels.value: User can log in after correcting invalid credentials
